title: Volkswagen Vehicle Configuration Structure
description: Field-level documentation for the VW OKAPI vehicle configuration model.

fields.name: typeId
fields.description: Base vehicle type UUID identifying the trim level and engine variant.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: ISO 3166-2 market code (AT, DE, GB, US, etc.).

fields.name: configId
fields.description: Session ID for resuming a saved in-progress configuration.

fields.name: selectedOptions
fields.description: UUIDs of selected options: exterior color, interior, wheels, radio, packages.

fields.name: buildable
fields.description: Whether the selected combination is buildable.

fields.name: conflicts
fields.description: List of option conflicts if configuration is not buildable.
